title: Genome Editing in Mice Using CRISPR/Cas9 Technology
assembly_method: Protocol-dependent; includes PCR-template sgRNA synthesis for IVT and optional BbsI cloning into pX330

explicit_sequences.name: sgRNA_oligo_1_template
explicit_sequences.role: Gene-specific oligo for PCR-based generation of an sgRNA template for IVT

explicit_sequences.name: sgRNA_oligo_2_common
explicit_sequences.role: Common oligo encoding sgRNA backbone elements

explicit_sequences.name: pX330_top_oligo_template
explicit_sequences.role: Top oligo for guide cloning into BbsI-digested pX330

explicit_sequences.name: pX330_bottom_oligo_template
explicit_sequences.role: Bottom oligo for guide cloning into BbsI-digested pX330

explicit_sequences.name: T7_sgRNA_F
explicit_sequences.role: Forward primer used to add a T7 promoter for IVT after pX330 cloning

explicit_sequences.name: T7_sgRNA_R
explicit_sequences.role: Reverse primer for T7-based sgRNA template amplification

explicit_sequences.name: Cas9_f
explicit_sequences.role: Forward primer to make a PCR template for Cas9 IVT from pX330

explicit_sequences.name: Cas9_r
explicit_sequences.role: Reverse primer to make a PCR template for Cas9 IVT from pX330

design_rules.name: Cas9_target_rule
design_rules.description: Select a unique genomic target of about 20 bp immediately followed by an NGG PAM for SpCas9.

design_rules.name: Guide_excludes_PAM
design_rules.description: Do not include the NGG PAM in the sgRNA guide sequence itself.

design_rules.name: Guide_count_rule
design_rules.description: Choose about 3 best sgRNAs with strong on-target scores and minimal off-target probability for further analysis.

design_rules.name: GC_content_rule
design_rules.description: Prefer overall GC content of roughly 40–60%, ideally with stronger GC content near the PAM-proximal seed region.

design_rules.name: T7_G_rule
design_rules.description: T7 transcription prefers one or two leading guanines at initiation; if the selected guide already starts with one or two G bases, the extra added Gs can be reduced.

design_rules.name: Knockin_distance_rule
design_rules.description: For knockin design, place the DSB as close as possible, ideally within about 10–20 bp, to the intended insertion site.

interpretation_notes: This paper provides protocol-level oligo templates and design patterns rather than one fully specified experiment-specific oligo set for a single locus.
Sequences containing N placeholders are templates to be instantiated with a user-selected protospacer.

key_constraints: This is a general mouse CRISPR protocol paper, not a single fixed construct paper.
The paper does not provide one complete construction-ready oligo set for a single experimental target.
The paper is best suited for protocol-style shorthand generation or rule-based oligo generation, not direct sequence-level reconstruction of one canonical build.
notes: The paper describes sgRNA synthesis by PCR-template IVT, optional cloning into pX330 via BbsI, and direct use of synthetic crRNA/tracrRNA in Easi-CRISPR workflows.
Pronuclear microinjection is presented as the main delivery workflow, with electroporation discussed as an alternative.
